text: Code refactoring: Split ui.ts mega-store (2547 lines)
description:
ui.ts is too large, split into focused stores:
- navigation.ts: Column/phase selection, keyboard nav
- modals.ts: Modal state management
- graph.ts: Graph view state
- settings.ts: Project settings, preferences

Benefits: Better maintainability, clearer boundaries, easier testing

status.comment: Refactor slice 2 complete: extracted project path/history normalization and mutation logic from `stores/ui.ts` into typed helper module `stores/ui/project-helpers.ts` and added focused unit coverage (`stores/ui/project-helpers.spec.ts`). `useUIStore` now delegates setProjectPath + project history actions to helpers, reducing duplication and centralizing path semantics. Verification: `npm run type-check -w frontend` passed; `npm run test:unit -w frontend` passed (14 files, 57 tests).
